## Description

Brief description of the changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would change existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Related Issue

Fixes #(issue number)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards (Ruff, Mypy, type hints)
- [ ] I have run `ruff check .`, `ruff format --check .`, and `mypy app/`
- [ ] I have added/updated tests as needed
- [ ] All tests pass (`pytest`)
- [ ] I have updated documentation if behavior or config changed
- [ ] My changes preserve or improve accessibility (touch targets, contrast, semantic HTML)
